title: Crunchy Spicy Dutch Fennel Skillet
description: A spicy and snappy Dutch dish featuring fennel bulb, perfect for meal prep and low-fat diets. This skillet is packed with flavor and nutrients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced fennel bulb and cook until it starts to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced dutch sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Continue to cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the flavors are combined.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
Let the skillet cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for meal prep.
